description: First base64 character of signature.sig.signatures[0].signature_b64 (Ed25519 sig) deterministically flipped via the alphabet's pairwise rotation (A↔B, C↔D, ..., a↔b, ..., 0↔1, ..., +↔/). Surfaces at Check 1 verifyEd25519Leg crypto verify (step 8); ML-DSA-65 leg still runs + passes per spec §18.10 no-short-circuit.

modifications.mutation: signatures[0].signature_b64 first base64 character flipped (alphabet pairwise rotation).
modifications.rationale: Ed25519 signature bytes change → cryptographic verification fails. The base64 string length + shape are unchanged so length-check + base64-decode both still succeed; only the crypto Verify fails.

expected_failures: check 1 (manifest signature): Ed25519 verification fails against pinned issuer-dev-v2-ed25519 key. algorithm_verdicts[0]={ed25519, fail}; algorithm_verdicts[1]={ml-dsa-65, pass} per spec §18.10 (ML-DSA-65 leg runs unconditionally regardless of Ed25519 outcome).
